meaning: 克拉彭[英国伦敦西南部一地区]
examples: Can you persuade the man on the Clapham omnibus that it is useful?
There's a good British Rail link at Clapham Junction.
A flock of Canada geese fly in formation above Clapham Common in London.
Adam Byatt's chic Trinity Restaurant in Clapham is perfect for an evening out with friends.
The 60-year-old from Clapham, south London, is arguing she was the victim of marital coercion.
